{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Flamewakers
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Some [[Guards]] have the eyes of [[Flamewakers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
